missions.title: The First Clue
missions.starting_clue: Arr! Welcome to Skull Island, young pirate! Old Pete says there be treasure nearby. Start by looking around with 'ls'.
missions.success_message: Shiver me timbers! You found the treasure map!
missions.treasure: A worn map tumbles out. X marks the spot on Skull Mountain!

/island/cave/old_note.txt.content: Arr, many have searched here before ye, young pirate...

/island/palm_tree.txt.content: A coconut falls on your head. Ouch!

missions.title: The Mountain Path
missions.starting_clue: The map says the treasure is at /mountain/peak/chest. Use 'find' to locate it!
missions.success_message: TREASURE FOUND! You are a true pirate master!
missions.treasure: A chest overflowing with gold doubloons! You've completed Skull Island!

/mountain/peak/chest.content:
*** TREASURE CHEST ***
Gold doubloons: 1000
You are a true pirate! Arr!

/mountain/path/sign.txt.content: This way to the peak! Watch for the chest...
